allow: Bash(git commit -m "Initial commit: LMS.uz landing page with animations and integrations")
Bash(git commit -m "Rename Landing Page.html to index.html for Netlify deployment")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate landing page from HTML to Vue 3 + Vite

Major changes:
- Convert static HTML to Vue 3 component-based architecture
- Split into 11 reusable components (NavBar, Hero, etc.)
- Add Vite for modern build tooling and HMR
- Implement scroll animations using Intersection Observer
- Preserve all original design, styling, and animations
- Add Netlify deployment configuration
- Backup original HTML version to old-html-version/

Tech stack:
- Vue 3 (Composition API)
- Vite 8
- Custom CSS with animations
- Intersection Observer API

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update university carousel: fix logos and styling

Changes:
- Fix logo case sensitivity: rename aifu.png → AIFU.png for Linux/Netlify
- Fix logo file extensions: OXU.jpg → OXU.png, AUNIVER.jpg → AUNIVER.png, SILKROAD.jpg → SILKROAD.png
- Change TIME logo color to white/inverted for better visibility on green background
- Increase logo sizes: 56px → 100px height, 80px → 150px width
- Increase text size: 14px → 18px with font-weight 600
- Change "RENESANS TA'LIM UNIVERSITETI"" to normal case: ""Renesans ta'lim universiteti"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update university carousel styling and fix logo references

- Increase logo sizes to 100px×150px (was 56px×80px)
- Increase text size to 18px with bold weight (was 14px)
- Fix TIME logo to use inverted colors for visibility
- Fix SILKROAD, OXU, AUNIVER file extensions (.png not .jpg)
- Normalize "RENESANS TA 'LIM UNIVERSITETI" to sentence case

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
